scripts.build: pnpm build:sdk && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/desktop build && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/web build && pnpm check:bundle-size
scripts.check:no-create-nimi-client: if rg -n "\bcreateNimiClient\b" sdk apps docs/examples scripts --glob '*.{ts,tsx,js,mjs,cjs}'; then echo "createNimiClient is removed; use Runtime/Realm classes" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:no-openapi-base-assignment: if rg -n "OpenAPI\.BASE\s*=" sdk apps docs/examples scripts --glob '*.{ts,tsx,js,mjs,cjs}'; then echo "OpenAPI.BASE assignment is forbidden; use Realm instance config" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:no-openapi-token-assignment: if rg -n "OpenAPI\.TOKEN\s*=" sdk apps docs/examples scripts --glob '*.{ts,tsx,js,mjs,cjs}'; then echo "OpenAPI.TOKEN assignment is forbidden; use Realm instance config" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:no-openapi-singleton-import: if rg -n "import\\s*\\{[^}]*\\bOpenAPI\\b[^}]*\\}\\s*from\\s*['\"]@nimiplatform/sdk/realm['\"]" sdk apps docs/examples scripts --glob '*.{ts,tsx,js,mjs,cjs}'; then echo "OpenAPI singleton import from @nimiplatform/sdk/realm is forbidden; use Realm instance" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:no-local-ai-private-calls: if rg -n "['\"]local_ai_[a-z0-9_]+['\"]" apps/desktop/src --glob '*.{ts,tsx}'; then echo "desktop TS private local_ai_* command literals are forbidden; use runtime.localRuntime.*" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:no-local-ai-tauri-commands: if rg -n "\blocal_ai_[a-z0-9_]+\b" apps/desktop/src-tauri/src --glob '*.rs'; then echo "desktop tauri local_ai_* command symbols are forbidden; use runtime bridge APIs" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:no-legacy-mod-permissions-field: if rg -n "\bpermissions\s*:" apps/desktop/src/runtime/mod apps/desktop/src/runtime/execution-kernel nimi-mods sdk/src/mod/types/runtime-mod.ts docs/mods/README.md --glob '*.{ts,tsx,md,yaml,yml}'; then echo "legacy permissions field is forbidden in manifest/runtime registration; use capabilities" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:no-nimid-doc-invocation: if rg -n "go run \./cmd/nimid" docs README.md runtime/README.md; then echo "legacy daemon invocation go run ./cmd/nimid is forbidden in docs; use go run ./cmd/nimi serve" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:no-nimid-source: if rg -n "cmd/nimid|\bnimid\b" runtime sdk ssot README.md CHANGELOG.md | rg -v "check:no-nimid-source" | rg -v "check:no-nimid-doc-invocation"; then echo "legacy nimid entry/symbol is forbidden; use go run ./cmd/nimi serve" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:desktop-no-client-alias: if rg -n "@client(/|$)" apps/desktop; then echo "desktop private alias @client is forbidden" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:no-legacy-imports: if rg -n "@nimiplatform/core-api-client" . | rg -v "check:no-legacy-imports"; then echo "legacy import @nimiplatform/core-api-client is forbidden" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:no-legacy-app-auth-cli: if rg -n "nimi grant|\`grant \\*\`|\|grant\||case \"grant\"|grant failed" runtime docs runtime/README.md | rg -v "runtime/cmd/nimi/usage_text_test.go" | rg -v "check:no-legacy-app-auth-cli"; then echo "legacy CLI command grant is forbidden; use app-auth" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.check:mods-no-runtime-sdk: if rg -n "@nimiplatform/sdk/runtime" nimi-mods -g '*.{ts,tsx,js,mjs,cjs}'; then echo "mods must not import runtime sdk directly" && exit 1; else exit 0; fi
scripts.lint: pnpm check:mods-no-runtime-sdk && pnpm check:local-chat-service-boundary && pnpm check:no-legacy-imports && pnpm check:no-legacy-app-auth-cli && pnpm check:no-local-ai-private-calls && pnpm check:no-local-ai-tauri-commands && pnpm check:no-legacy-mod-permissions-field && pnpm check:no-nimid-doc-invocation && pnpm check:no-nimid-source && pnpm check:desktop-token-api-runtime-only && pnpm check:no-legacy-cloud-provider-keys && pnpm check:examples && pnpm check:markdown && pnpm check:no-absolute-user-paths && pnpm check:no-legacy-doc-contracts && pnpm check:runtime-spec-kernel-consistency && pnpm check:runtime-spec-kernel-docs-drift && pnpm check:ssot-frontmatter && pnpm check:ssot-traceability && pnpm check:ssot-links && pnpm check:ssot-boundary && pnpm check:ssot-proto-first && pnpm check:runtime-bridge-method-drift && pnpm check:scope-catalog-drift && pnpm check:sdk-import-boundary && pnpm check:sdk-single-package-layout && pnpm check:sdk-public-naming && pnpm check:no-create-nimi-client && pnpm check:no-openapi-base-assignment && pnpm check:no-openapi-token-assignment && pnpm check:no-openapi-singleton-import && pnpm check:reason-code-constants && pnpm check:desktop-no-client-alias && pnpm check:package-license-matrix && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/desktop lint && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/web lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/sdk test && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/desktop test && pnpm --filter @nimiplatform/web test
